_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from SCEM sources — unanalysed

items.title: Initial three rounds of US-Iran ceasefire talks conclude after 14 hours
items.summary: Ceasefire talks between US and Iran end without deal; Iran says negotiations continue. Disagreement over Iran's nuclear development; US made final offer.
items.domain_relevance: Diplomatic de-escalation attempt in 2026 Iran war; nuclear signals

items.title: US VP Vance: No deal in Iran ceasefire talks over nuclear issue
items.summary: JD Vance states US-Iran talks failed due to nuclear weapon disagreement; US presented final offer.
items.domain_relevance: Nuclear signals and stalled de-escalation in Middle East crisis

items.title: Pakistan urges US-Iran to uphold ceasefire commitment
items.summary: Deputy PM Ishaq Dar calls on US and Iran to observe ceasefire after failed talks; Pakistan to facilitate dialogue.
items.domain_relevance: Diplomatic developments in 2026 Iran war ceasefire

items.title: Israel launches airstrikes across southern Lebanon
items.summary: Israel conducts airstrikes in southern Lebanon amid Hezbollah-Israel conflict and 2026 Lebanon war.
items.domain_relevance: Military operations escalation in Lebanon war

items.title: Trump expects Iran to honor ceasefire ahead of Pakistan talks
items.summary: President Trump warns of large-scale US attacks if Iran violates ceasefire; VP Vance to attend talks in Pakistan.
items.domain_relevance: Escalation threat and diplomatic talks in Iran conflict

items.title: Iran signals tighter control of Strait of Hormuz with possible tolls
items.summary: Iran allows ship coordination for safe passage but traffic low; leaders signal new tolls on waterway.
items.domain_relevance: Economic coercion and naval escalation in Iran war

items.title: Iran plans tolls in Strait of Hormuz amid war economic coercion
items.summary: Tehran floats collecting tolls from ships transiting Strait, violating norms and weaponizing geography.
items.domain_relevance: Strategic economic escalation in 2026 Iran war
